headline: SCE to Host Community Meeting as Support for Eaton Fire Recovery Continues
summary: ROSEMEAD, Calif., June 11, 2026--Southern California Edison today announced it will host a community meeting at Westminster Presbyterian Church in Pasadena on June 30, bringing together company leaders and program participants to share updates on the Wildfire Recovery Compensation Program and connect community members with resources to support recovery following the Eaton Fire.
